title: Gas Price Widget
description: Embeddable real-time gas tracker with open/fast/instant tiers and USD fee estimates — drop it into any dApp to show live network conditions.
useCase: Build a reusable gas price component that shows open/fast/instant gas tiers with estimated USD fees for an ETH transfer and ERC-20 transfer — refreshes every 15 seconds.

keyParams.chainName: EVM chain to fetch gas prices for
keyParams.eventType: Transaction type for fee estimation — 'erc20' or 'uniswapv3'
